name: Video Interview - Question Generation and email

parameters.query:
-- Get the JD from Round 1
SELECT DISTINCT
  job_title,
  required_skills,
  optional_skills,
  experience_level,
  salary_budget,
  question_count,
  time_limit,
  difficulty,
  focus_areas
FROM job_requirements_v2
WHERE screening_id IN (
  SELECT c.screening_id
  FROM candidates_v2 c
  INNER JOIN assessment_results_v2 r ON c.screening_id = r.screening_id
  WHERE r.is_passed = TRUE
    AND c.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
)
LIMIT 1;

options.systemMessage:
You are an expert technical interviewer specializing in personalized video interview questions. 
  Generate questions that are specifically tailored to each candidate's background and experience.
  Return ONLY valid JSON without any markdown formatting or code blocks.

parameters.jsCode:
// ======================================== // Prepare Video Interview Email - FIXED VERSION // ======================================== // Get candidate data let candidateData = {}; try { candidateData = $('Parse Generated Questions').first().json; } catch (error) { console.log('Could not get candidate data'); throw new Error('Failed to get candidate data for email'); } console.log(`\n📧 PREPARING EMAIL FOR: ${candidateData.name}`); const videoInterviewUrl = `http://127.0.0.1:5500/video-interview.html?id=${candidateData.video_assessment_id}`; const emailHTML = `

🎥 Video Interview Invitation - Round 2

${candidateData.jobRequirements.title} Position

Dear ${candidateData.name},

Congratulations on passing the technical assessment! 🎉

You are now invited to our personalized video interview. We've carefully crafted 5 unique questions specifically for you based on your background and experience.

📋 Interview Details

  • Format: Video Interview (5 personalized questions)
  • Duration: Approximately 10 minutes
  • Time per Question: 2 minutes to answer
  • Questions: Mix of technical and experience-based

⚠️ Important Instructions

  • Camera & Microphone: Ensure both are working
  • Stable Internet: Required for video upload
  • Quiet Environment: Minimal background noise
  • Good Lighting: Your face should be clearly visible
  • Professional Setting: Dress appropriately
  • Answer in English: All responses must be in English
  • Single Attempt: You can only take this interview once
  • Complete Soon: Within 3 days of receiving this email

🔗 Start Your Personalized Interview

Begin Video Interview

Interview ID: ${candidateData.video_assessment_id}
Expires: ${new Date(candidateData.expires_at).toLocaleDateString()} (3 days)

💡 Tip: The questions are based on your specific experience, so review your resume before starting!

Questions? Contact our HR team at hr@company.com

We're excited to learn more about you!

`; return [{ json: { to: candidateData.email, subject: `🎥 Round 2: Your Personalized Video Interview - ${candidateData.jobRequirements.title}`, html: emailHTML, // Metadata for tracking candidate_name: candidateData.name, video_assessment_id: candidateData.video_assessment_id, expires_at: candidateData.expires_at, interview_url: videoInterviewUrl } }];

parameters.query:
-- Get all passed candidates with their resume data
SELECT 
  c.screening_id,
  c.name,
  c.email,
  c.phone,
  c.location,
  c.current_company,
  c.job_title,
  c.match_score,
  c.required_skills,
  c.experience_level,
  c.salary_expectation,
  c.resume_drive_id,
  c.resume_file_name,
  c.resume_drive_url,
  c.resume_text,
  r.score_percentage,
  r.grade,
  r.correct_answers,
  r.total_questions,
  r.completed_at,
  r.is_passed
FROM candidates_v2 c
INNER JOIN assessment_results_v2 r 
  ON c.screening_id = r.screening_id
WHERE r.is_passed = TRUE
  AND c.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
ORDER BY r.score_percentage DESC, c.match_score DESC
LIMIT 1;
